metadata.title: Update modified date
metadata.description: Automatically update a frontmatter modified date field when you modify your note. This will not use the filesystem time, but only when you modify the file through Obsidian. Optionally store a history of edit times.

regex.source: .setName("Modified date property")
regex.target: .setName("修改日期属性")

regex.source: .setName("Created date property (optional)")
regex.target: .setName("创建日期属性")

regex.source: .setName("Date format")
regex.target: .setName("日期格式")

regex.source: .setName("Store history of all updates")
regex.target: .setName("是否存储所有更新历史")

regex.source: .setName("Frequency of updates")
regex.target: .setName("更新频率")

regex.source: .setName("Order to store the history items")
regex.target: .setName("记录时间的顺序")

regex.source: .setName("Maximum number of history items")
regex.target: .setName("保留时间更新的最大数量")

regex.source: .setName("Vault options")
regex.target: .setName("库选项")

regex.source: .setName("Exclude folders")
regex.target: .setName("排除文件夹")

regex.source: .setName("Only update existing fields")
regex.target: .setName("仅更新现有字段")

regex.source: .setName("Use typing events instead of Obsidian events")
regex.target: .setName("使用键入事件而不是obsidian事件")

regex.source: .setName("Timeout (seconds)")
regex.target: .setName("延时多少秒开始更新 (seconds)")

regex.source: .setName("Update count property")
regex.target: .setName("更新计数属性")

regex.source: .setDesc("The name of the YAML/frontmatter property to update when your note is modified")
regex.target: .setDesc("修改笔记时要更新的YAML/frontmatter属性的名称")

regex.source: .setDesc("Optional. Add a created property name, and the plugin will also update the note creation date.")
regex.target: .setDesc("可选。添加已创建的属性名称，插件还将更新注释创建日期。")

regex.source: .setDesc("This is in MomentJS format. Leave blank for the default ATOM format.")
regex.target: .setDesc("这是MomentJS格式的。将默认ATOM格式留空。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`Instead of storing only the last modified time, this will turn your "${this.plugin.settings.frontmatterProperty}" frontmatter property into a list of all of the dates/times you've edited this note.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`这将使您的"${this.plugin.settings.frontmatterProperty}" frontmatter属性转换为您编辑此笔记的所有日期/时间的列表。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("The plugin will store a maximum of 1 history entry per the selected time unit. If there are multiple edits in the specified period, the last edit entry will be updated instead.")
regex.target: .setDesc("该插件将在所选时间单位内最多存储1个历史条目。如果在指定时间段内有多个编辑，则将更新最后一个编辑条目。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Leave blank or zero for unlimited history items.")
regex.target: .setDesc("对于无限制的历史项目，请留空或为零。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add a list of folders to exclude, one folder per line. All subfolders will be also excluded.")
regex.target: .setDesc("添加要排除的文件夹列表，每行一个文件夹。所有子文件夹也将被排除在外.")

regex.source: .setDesc("If you turn this on, it will only update a frontmatter field *if that field already exists*.")
regex.target: .setDesc("若开启, 它只会更新前言字段 *假如该字段已经存在*.")

regex.source: .setDesc('How many seconds to wait after the last edit before updating the modified field. You can increase this value if you are experiencing too many "Merging changes" popups.')
regex.target: .setDesc('在上次编辑后等待多少秒才能更新修改后的字段。如果您遇到太多的 "Merging changes" 弹出窗口，可以增加此值。')

regex.source: .setDesc("The name of the YAML/frontmatter property to store the update count.")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于存储更新计数的YAML/frontmatter属性的名称。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`If you make changes to a file using an external editor and Obsidian is currently open, Obsidian
regex.target: .setDesc(`如果您使用外部编辑器对文件进行更改，并且Obsidian当前处于打开状态，则Obsidian

regex.source: will register this as a modification and update the frontmatter. If you don't want this to happen, and only
regex.target:
将此注册为修改并更新frontmatter。
如果你不希望这种情况发生，只有

regex.source: want the frontmatter when you are making changes inside Obsidian, you can try this mode. It watches for typing
regex.target:
当你在 Obsidian 内部进行更改时，你可以尝试这种模式。
它监视打字

regex.source: events, and then updates the frontmatter only when you type. This means that some events like updating your note
regex.target: 事件，然后仅在键入时更新frontmatter。这意味着某些事件，如更新您的笔记

regex.source: or properties using your mouse will not cause the modified field to update. You will need to restart Obsidian
regex.target: 或者使用鼠标的属性不会导致修改后的字段更新。您需要在这一变化之后重新启动 Obsidian

regex.source: after this change.`)
